_instructions: Single-page lead generation website for Trogen Facility Services Melbourne. Optimized for digital ads and WhatsApp lead capture.

project.name: Trogen Facility Services
project.description: Trogen Facility Services provides professional cleaning solutions across Melbourne - from window cleaning and commercial cleaning to end of lease cleans. IICRC certified with 6 years of experience. WhatsApp-first contact for fast quotes.
project.target_audience: Melbourne renters ending leases, property managers, commercial businesses, homeowners needing one-off or regular cleaning. Ages 25-55.

branding.notes: Accent color #25D366 is WhatsApp green - used for all primary CTAs since WhatsApp is the main contact method. Primary blue for trust/professionalism. Dark navy for dark sections.

pages.name: Home
pages.description: Single-page lead generation landing page optimized for digital ads. All content on one page with WhatsApp CTA buttons throughout.

shared_elements.header: Sticky header with logo text, nav anchors, and WhatsApp CTA button
shared_elements.footer: Compact footer with contact info, service area, and legal

services.name: Window Cleaning
services.description: Professional external and internal window cleaning for homes and businesses. Streak-free results guaranteed.

services.name: Commercial Cleaning
services.description: Reliable cleaning for offices, retail spaces, and commercial properties. Flexible scheduling to suit your business hours.

services.name: One-Off Cleaning
services.description: Deep cleaning for any occasion - spring cleans, pre-sale preparation, post-renovation cleanup, or whenever you need a fresh start.

services.name: End of Lease Cleaning
services.description: Get your bond back with our thorough end of lease cleaning. Prices from $250 for 1 bed, 1 bath with steam clean.

end_of_lease_pricing.headline: End of Lease Cleaning
end_of_lease_pricing.subheadline: Get your full bond back - guaranteed
end_of_lease_pricing.note: For other configurations, contact us for a free quote via WhatsApp or phone.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.quote: Trogen did an amazing end of lease clean for my apartment. Got my full bond back with no issues. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: David L.
testimonials.quote: We use Trogen for our weekly office cleaning. Always professional, always thorough. The team is reliable and easy to work with.

testimonials.name: Jenny K.
testimonials.quote: Had all our windows cleaned inside and out. They were spotless! Great communication via WhatsApp and very fair pricing.

faq.question: How much does an end of lease clean cost?
faq.answer: Our end of lease cleaning starts from $250 for a 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom property with steam clean included. Larger properties are priced based on bedrooms, bathrooms, and any add-ons. Message us on WhatsApp for an instant quote.

faq.question: Do you guarantee I will get my bond back?
faq.answer: Yes. We provide a bond-back guarantee on all end of lease cleans. If your agent requests a re-clean within 72 hours, we will return and address it at no extra cost.

faq.question: What areas in Melbourne do you service?
faq.answer: We service all Melbourne metropolitan areas including eastern, south-eastern, and CBD suburbs. Contact us to confirm availability in your area.

faq.question: How do I book a cleaning?
faq.answer: The fastest way is via WhatsApp - just tap the green button on this page. You can also call us on 0426 047 075. We usually respond within a few hours.

faq.question: Are you insured and certified?
faq.answer: Yes. We hold IICRC Water Restoration Technician certification and carry full public liability insurance for your peace of mind.

faq.question: What add-on services do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer balcony cleaning, garage cleaning, and wall washing as add-ons to any of our cleaning packages. Ask us for pricing when you get your quote.
